title: Ghati Subramanya
tagline: Ghati Subramanya — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Ghati Subramanya (Kannada: ಘಾಟಿ ಸುಬ್ರಮಣ್ಯ) is a Hindu temple, situated in the village of Sri Subamanya Ghati near Tubagere, Doddaballapura, Karnataka, India.
overview.description: Ghati Subramanya (Kannada: ಘಾಟಿ ಸುಬ್ರಮಣ್ಯ) is a Hindu temple, situated in the village of Sri Subamanya Ghati near Tubagere, Doddaballapura, Karnataka, India. It is 60 km from the city of Bangalore and is a popular pilgrimage centre. The uniqueness of this temple is that the prime deity Lord Karthikeya, is found together with Lord Narasimha. According to mythology, both idols are believed to have emerged from the earth.

topPlaces.name: Karepura
topPlaces.description: Karepura is a village in Bengaluru North district in the state of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Doddaballapura
topPlaces.description: Doddaballapura is a city and the district headquarters of Bengaluru North district in the state of Karnataka, India. Dodda means "big" in the native language Kannada.

topPlaces.name: Goraghatta
topPlaces.description: Goraghatta is a village in the taluk of Nelamangala in Bangalore Rural District of Karnataka State, India. Goraghatta rests on the border between Nelmangala and Doddaballapura.

topPlaces.name: Dargajogihalli
topPlaces.description: Dargajogihalli is a census town in Bengaluru North district in the state of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Bashettihalli
topPlaces.description: Bashettihalli is a suburb of Doddaballapura in the state of Karnataka, originally envisaged as an industrial town of Doddaballapur city The latitude 12.9779204 and longitude 77.5687766 are the geocoordinate of the Bashettihalli. There is a similar-sounding village Bashattihalli in Sidlaghatta taluk.

topPlaces.name: Alahalli
topPlaces.description: Alahalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Bangalore South taluk of Bangalore Urban district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Adinarayana Hosahalli
topPlaces.description: Adinarayana Hosahalli, commonly known by its nickname as A N Hosahalli, is a village located in the Doddaballapur taluk of Bengaluru North district, in the southern state of Karnataka, India. The village is nearly 5 km from Doddaballapura.

topPlaces.name: Tubagere
topPlaces.description: Tubagere or Tubagere pete is a Town and Grama Panchayat in Bengaluru North district in Karnataka, India. Primary language spoken is Kannada.

items.note: Karepura is a village in Bengaluru North district in the state of Karnataka, India.
Doddaballapura is a city and the district headquarters of Bengaluru North district in the state of Karnataka, India. Dodda means "big" in the native language Kannada.
Goraghatta is a village in the taluk of Nelamangala in Bangalore Rural District of Karnataka State, India. Goraghatta rests on the border between Nelmangala and Doddaballapura.
Dargajogihalli is a census town in Bengaluru North district in the state of Karnataka, India.

Bashettihalli is a suburb of Doddaballapura in the state of Karnataka, originally envisaged as an industrial town of Doddaballapur city The latitude 12.9779204 and longitude 77.5687766 are the geocoordinate of the Bashettihalli. There is a similar-sounding village Bashattihalli in Sidlaghatta taluk.
Alahalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Bangalore South taluk of Bangalore Urban district in Karnataka.

Adinarayana Hosahalli, commonly known by its nickname as A N Hosahalli, is a village located in the Doddaballapur taluk of Bengaluru North district, in the southern state of Karnataka, India. The village is nearly 5 km from Doddaballapura.
Tubagere or Tubagere pete is a Town and Grama Panchayat in Bengaluru North district in Karnataka, India. Primary language spoken is Kannada.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ghati Subramanya?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ghati Subramanya is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ghati Subramanya?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (21 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (35 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ghati Subramanya?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ghati Subramanya at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ghati Subramanya?
faq.a: Stays in Ghati Subramanya start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ghati Subramanya?
faq.a: The top attractions are Karepura, Doddaballapura, Goraghatta, Dargajogihalli, Bashettihalli.
